{{CargoRelic
|name=Fungus XL
|class_id=20009
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=The fungi from the Fungus Farm didn't want to be gathered. Their resentment took a human form and became a Hitman working for Demon Gods! After its defeat, its essence coalesced into this Relic. It is an upsetting fact that you took full advantage of this poor little thing.
|fame=11
|art=15
|fth=16
|civ=30
|tech=18
|ss1=Per 10 DEF-Fungi eaten, Snail ATK +1<br>DEF-Fungi Eaten: 500/500
|ss2=Per 10 DEF-Fungi eaten, Snail ATK +2<br>DEF-Fungi Eaten: 500/500
|ss3=Per 10 DEF-Fungi eaten, Snail ATK +3<br>DEF-Fungi Eaten: 500/500
|ss4=Per 10 DEF-Fungi eaten, Snail ATK +3<br>DEF-Fungi Eaten: 500/500
|ss7=Per 10 DEF-Fungi eaten, Snail ATK +3<br>DEF-Fungi Eaten: 500/500<br> (Awakened)
}}
